__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Three Laws of Robotics,The Card Players,Ugarit Tablets,Celtic Bronze Plaque Engraving,The Peony Pavilion,The Great Learning
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=minion
|description=All Demon Minion Skins, HARD Stats +120%
}}
[[Category:Minion]]
[[Category:Demon Minion HARD Boost]]
[[Category:Minion Skin Boost]]
